activation_status.reason: capsule directory is inside the live campaign's support root; reading it could race the running teacher capture, so it is reported, not opened

one_call_decomposition.command_buffer_definition: residual = wall - x_upload - host_encode - gpu_execution (commit, scheduling, waitUntilCompleted, readback)

compact.notes: gravity_decode.decode_matvec_mps; bytes are an ANALYTIC model of the materialized [rows,nchunk,sub] decode, not a counter reading

cpu.notes: gravity_forge.pq_execute on CPU, the parity authority

custom_1call.notes: gravity_metal one call including waitUntilCompleted; bytes from gravity_metal.matvec_bytes executed model (per-threadgroup re-reads billed)

custom_batched.notes: 32 dispatches in ONE command buffer, per-dispatch amortized; queue built with maxCommandBufferCount=1024 and an autorelease pool per rep. NOT matched to the single-call spec, so no speedup is formed against it

dense.notes: torch fp16 matvec on MPS, torch.mps.synchronize() inside the timed region; the dense weight was reconstructed from the artifact ONCE, outside it

roofline_gpu_billed_custom.note: billed against the batched per-dispatch GPU time, which is the only measurement free of command-buffer cost

fp16_cast_control.purpose: control for the 2.1e-4 parity figure; synthetic weights, R0 geometry, 512x256 (the size gravity_metal.selftest uses)

label: GLM-5.2 matched baseline on REAL artifacts

down.gate_source: gravity_decode.parity tolerance; 1e-6 is NOT the gate -- gravity_metal casts the codebook to fp16, so 2.1e-4 is the fp16 floor

gate.gate_source: gravity_decode.parity tolerance; 1e-6 is NOT the gate -- gravity_metal casts the codebook to fp16, so 2.1e-4 is the fp16 floor

up.gate_source: gravity_decode.parity tolerance; 1e-6 is NOT the gate -- gravity_metal casts the codebook to fp16, so 2.1e-4 is the fp16 floor

provenance.expert_selection: FIXED LIST: model.layers.N.mlp.gate.weight is absent from every shard, so no routing decision was made or claimed

refuted_claims.name: dense_fp16_9.012ms
refuted_claims.reason: dense fp16 MPS was re-measured at 0.3674 ms; 9.012 ms is 24x wrong and is the baseline the retracted 35.9x speedup was divided by

refuted_claims.name: speedup_35.9x
refuted_claims.reason: computed against the refuted 9.012 ms dense baseline; the matched single-call result is 0.727x at down and 0.329x at gate/up (custom is SLOWER)

refuted_claims.name: metal_parity_1.4e-6
refuted_claims.reason: mislabelled: 1.4e-6 belongs to the torch fp32 path. Custom Metal parity is 2.1e-4, caused by gravity_metal.py:202 casting the codebook to fp16
